data.content:
Plan for Codex detail output visibility

Evidence from live adrian session:
- Live session: /home/cartine/.config/foolery/logs/foolery/2026-04-25/term-1777101921516-37ganw.jsonl
- Beat/session: foolery-f354, session term-1777101921516-37ganw, iteration 2, agent GPT 5.4 via /home/cartine/.npm-global/bin/codex.
- Raw Codex JSON-RPC has 464 item/agentMessage/delta events from 2026-04-25T07:26:00Z to 07:29:20Z. The text is present as params.delta, e.g. delta="Using", " the", etc.
- src/lib/codex-jsonrpc-session.ts currently reads params.text for item/agentMessage/delta and reasoning deltas, so those chunks are dropped.
- Raw Codex JSON-RPC has 292 item/commandExecution/outputDelta events from 2026-04-25T07:29:26Z onward. The method is listed in TRANSLATED_METHODS but translateNotification has no branch for it, so command output is not surfaced coherently.
- The repeated Detail UI lines come from src/lib/terminal-manager-format.ts formatEventPayload rendering empty content_block_delta as '(no text)', especially item.completed reasoning entries with empty summary/content.
- Current live hang is separate but related: Codex launched /home/cartine/node_modules/.bin/bun run dev --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3000 as a foreground commandExecution at 2026-04-25T07:29:25Z, then Foolery kept ingesting dev-server request logs. No turn/completed or child_close was present by 07:40Z. Thread status also changed to waitingOnApproval after a playwright browser_evaluate elicitation at 07:29:50Z.

Implementation plan:
1. Update src/lib/codex-jsonrpc-session.ts to accept Codex JSON-RPC delta text from params.delta as well as params.text for item/agentMessage/delta, item/reasoning/summaryTextDelta, item/reasoning/textDelta, and item/commandExecution/outputDelta.
2. Translate agent-message deltas into stream_event content_block_delta with the actual text so Detail mode shows text instead of '(no text)'. Preserve completed agentMessage handling for final assistant summaries, but avoid duplicate final text where possible if existing normalizer state already accounts for streamed message IDs.
3. Translate commandExecution/outputDelta into incremental tool_result/user detail events, keyed by itemId if needed, so foreground command output appears immediately. Continue translating item.started commandExecution as Bash tool_use, and item.completed commandExecution as final output/error.
4. Suppress empty reasoning item.completed events: if reasoning summary/content text is empty, return null instead of a content_block_delta with empty text. Also consider making terminal-manager-format skip '(no text)' for content_block_delta with no text unless there are meaningful extras.
5. Surface JSON-RPC approval/elicitation requests, especially mcpServer/elicitation/request, as visible stderr or assistant/tool detail events. The f354 session was waitingOnApproval for playwright browser_evaluate with no obvious terminal explanation.
6. Add focused tests in src/lib/__tests__/codex-jsonrpc-session.test.ts and/or src/lib/__tests__/agent-adapter.test.ts for params.delta agent text, commandExecution outputDelta, empty reasoning suppression, and approval request visibility. Add a terminal formatting test if changing '(no text)' behavior.
7. Validation: run targeted tests first, then bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build in the implementation worktree after bun install --frozen-lockfile if node_modules is absent.

Risks:
- Need to avoid duplicating streamed assistant text and final item.completed text.
- Long-running foreground commands are a workflow/runtime problem; output visibility fix will make the hang obvious, but a later implementation may need watchdog/foreground-dev-server guidance separately.
- adrian worktree is behind origin/main and has local tsconfig.json/.codex changes, so implementation should use a fresh dedicated worktree and avoid touching those unrelated changes.
